issues.description: Action type 'Rest' is incorrect. The card redirects attack target to a selected Character, not rest. Should be a redirect/change-target action or similar game mechanic.
Second effect with trigger 'Trigger' and DrawCard action has no basis in card text. Card text contains no draw effect. This effect should be removed entirely.
Condition checks for 'Baroque Works' card on board, but text requires Leader type includes 'Baroque Works'. Should use condition type 'LeaderHasType' with value 'Baroque Works'.
Target should represent selecting one of your own Characters to redirect attack to, not a generic Rest action. The mechanic is attack redirection, not character resting.
